# Sample AI Citation Blog Post

According to a 2026 industry survey, 64% of content teams now track AI citation visibility alongside organic traffic. This fixture includes headings, links, and images for deterministic tests.

## What makes a post citation-ready?

Citation-ready posts answer the question directly, cite named sources, and keep each section self-contained. They use clear entities and avoid unsupported claims.

![Dashboard screenshot](https://example.com/hero.png)

## FAQ

### How often should teams refresh posts?

Refresh important posts when data changes or when search intent shifts.
